raw_response: Given your travel needs and high quality sensitivity, the Anker Nano 67W charger is an excellent choice. Its compact foldable design makes it ideal for carrying in a pocket or bag, while its GaN technology ensures fast charging without taking up much space. Despite being slightly pricier than your budget allows, you're not very price-sensitive and value quality, making this Anker charger worth the investment. Plus, your familiarity with Anker adds confidence in its performance.
